final_diagnosis: Hepatic atrophy due to portal vein thrombosis
matching_diagnosis: Chronic portal vein thrombosis with cavernous transformation
differential_reasoning: Hepatic atrophy due to portal vein thrombosis is semantically encompassed by chronic portal vein thrombosis with cavernous transformation, which represents the same underlying portal venous obstructive process.
